description: Design a 3D printable control knob in FreeCAD featuring a 25mm diameter, 5mm high cylindrical base and a 15mm diameter, 12mm high cylindrical grip. The model must include a 10mm deep D-shaft mounting socket on the bottom face (6mm diameter with a flat cut 2.5mm from center), a 1.5mm wide, 6mm long, 1mm deep position indicator groove on the top face, and a 1mm fillet on the top circular edge of the grip. Save the completed model to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/control_knob.FCStd.
